task: Docs-only follow-up to the merged FH-5 Bankruptcy Modeler spec, applying Jorge's LOCKED posting decision (2026-06-14): POST TO BOOKS. The confirmed Chapter 11 reorganized balances/rates become the actual GL (not modeling-only). Removes the former open A/B/A+B fork; locks: build the posting path AND the plan-vs-actual tracker + benefit view on top. Per reorganized debt: book balance adjustment (old->new) + re-rate/re-amortize via FH-3 (retain pre-reorg schedule, audited). Restatement JE treatment / effective date (plan confirmation/effective date) / fresh-start accounting determined WITH the accountant -- software executes their spec, does not invent bankruptcy accounting. Posting deliberate, gated (BANKRUPTCY_POST_ADJUSTMENTS_ENABLED default OFF), preview-first, balance-or-fail, GUARD-verified vs QuickBooks, never auto-fired. Resolves FH-5 open question (a). NO code, no DDL, no posting. Edits docs/specs/FH-5-BANKRUPTCY-MODELER-DESIGN.md.
